title: Apply online for a study permit - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply online for a study permit
You must apply online for a study permit. Before you apply, make sure you read the application instructions and have all the required documents.
How to apply for a study permit

## Apply for a study permit
As of March 25, 2025, you must use the IRCC secure account to apply for a
- study permit extension
Sign in to the IRCC secure account

### If you already have an application in the IRCC Portal
If you started an application for a study permit using the portal but you didn’t submit it, you’ll need to start a new application using the IRCC secure account.
If you already submitted your application using the IRCC Portal, you can continue using it to check the status of your application.
Sign in to the IRCC Portal
